title: Provision service account
notes: Provisioning form. Composes CreateServiceAccountInput. On successful POST, the response includes the plaintext exchange secret ONCE — the client-side handler opens the SecretDisplayModal which renders the secret with a copy-to-clipboard control and requires an explicit `I've stored this securely` acknowledgement before dismissing. Never navigates away with the secret still visible.

props.className: max-w-2xl mx-auto flex flex-col gap-4 p-6

props.title: Store the secret immediately
props.children: After you submit, the plaintext exchange secret appears ONCE. Store it in Doppler or your secrets manager before dismissing the confirmation dialog — it is NOT retrievable after that.

onSuccess.propsExpr: { secret: response.data.secret, service_account_id: response.data.id, name: response.data.name, expires_at: response.data.expires_at }

props.name: application_id
props.label: Application
props.description: Immutable after creation. Cross-application SAs are not permitted — use one SA per Application.

options.$expr: applications.map(a => ({ key: a.id, label: a.slug + ' — ' + a.name }))

props.name: tenant_id
props.label: Tenant scope (optional)
props.description: When populated, the SA is scoped to this tenant. Must belong to the selected Application. Leave empty for platform-plane SAs (cross-tenant integrations — requires the `service_accounts_platform_plane` entitlement).

props.name: name
props.label: Name
props.description: Unique per Application. 3-128 chars, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

props.name: description
props.label: Description (optional)
props.description: Operator-facing purpose. Free-form; visible on the show screen + audit reports.

props.name: signer_kid
props.label: Signer kid (optional)
props.description: Leave empty to provision a fresh kid via the auth module. Specify an existing kid to share with other SAs in this Application.

props.name: ttl_days
props.label: TTL (days)
props.description: How long the secret is valid. Rotation-due notification fires 14 days before expiry.

props.name: reason
props.label: Reason (for audit log)
props.description: Free-form justification captured on the audit row. Required in staging + prod.
